steps.t: Khôr-buri-Ghân has gone to the Orc-camp on the road north of the Drúadan Forest. Ghân-buri-Ghân has offered to help the Rohirrim if you will help his …
Khôr-buri-Ghân asked you to draw the enemy's attention by entering the Orc-camp.
Khôr-buri-Ghân asked you to draw the enemy's attention by entering the Orc-camp, Maudhúl Grak.
Khôr-buri-Ghân is in the depths of Maudhúl Grak, waiting to speak with you.
You should return to Drû Bhûta and speak with Ghân-buri-Ghân.
Ghân-buri-Ghân is in the village of Drû Bhûta. You entered Maudhúl Grak near Amon Dîn and recovered the body of Ghân-buri-Ghân's son, slain by Orcs. H…
The Blood-cloak is to the east of the great waterfall in Drû Bhûta, atop a large rocky cliff. It is the location where the Wild Men perform their fune…
